name: txlookup
description: MCP server for Texas open civic data. Bounded discovery, scoped queries, citation-enforced summaries across Austin / Dallas / SA / Houston / TX state Socrata portals. Plus a multi-agent orchestrator (data analyst + reporter + support + critic + dataset scout).
tagline: Sourced answers from Texas public data, in 7 seconds.

tools.name: discover_datasets
tools.description: Find a relevant Texas civic dataset for a question. Returns up to 5 candidates from the curated catalog.

query.description: Plain-English question or topic (e.g. 'food truck permits 78702')

tools.name: get_dataset_schema
tools.description: Inspect a dataset's columns, types, and field-name aliases before constructing a SoQL query. Always run this BEFORE fetch_data on a dataset you haven't queried recently.

tools.name: fetch_data
tools.description: Fetch up to 100 rows from a Texas Socrata dataset. SoQL `where` clause required for any scoped query (zip, date range). Cache-first: cached rows return in <50ms; live fetch falls back automatically when cache is cold.

where.description: SoQL WHERE clause, e.g. "original_zip='78702' AND issue_date >= '2026-01-01'"

safety: Returns _source: cache | live | cache-fallback so caller can audit provenance
Mandatory dataset citation enforced downstream by cite_dataset

tools.name: ask_data
tools.description: End-to-end agent loop. Plain-English question → reason → plan → tool dispatch (with replan on failure + doom-loop guard + critic-driven revision) → cited synthesized answer. Wraps the multi-agent orchestrator (data analyst + reporter + critic).

input.query: Where do permits and code violations both spike together this year by zip?

examples.output_summary: Composes 2 parallel data_analyst branches → critic approves → reporter composes → cite_dataset

tools.name: get_task_status
tools.description: Poll status of a long-running ask_data task started in async mode.

tools.name: create_miro_board
tools.description: Create a Miro board for visualizing agent results. Returns board ID + URL.

tools.name: add_to_miro
tools.description: Post a structured payload (frame + sticky grid + chart card) to an existing Miro board.

tools.name: list_known_tools
tools.description: Self-introspection: returns this tool catalog. Useful for agents that load the server dynamically.

examples.claude_code_install: claude mcp add txlookup -- python -m mcp.server
examples.codex_install: codex mcp add txlookup --command python --args -m --args mcp.server
examples.smoke_test: echo '{"query":"food truck permits in 78702 last 6 months"}' | python -c 'import json,sys; from mcp.server import ask_data; import asyncio; print(asyncio.run(ask_data(json.load(sys.stdin)["query"])))'

moats: Citation-enforced: tool loop CANNOT terminate without cite_dataset
Composed multi-agent reasoning (specialist + critic + parallel) visible per-step
Doom-loop pattern detection (3+ identical OR [A,B,A,B] cycle) — patentable
Always-on dataset scout grows the corpus on a 6h cron
Run-archive: every accepted answer replayable + scored
SQLite cache enables cross-dataset SQL JOINs Socrata can't express
